~/infra/eks-cluster.tf
module "eks" {
source = "terraform-aws-modules/eks"
version = "~> 20.0"
cluster_name = var.cluster_name
cluster_version = "1.29"
vpc_id = module.vpc.vpc_id
}
$ terraform apply --auto-approve █
✓ CKA · AWS · Terraform
SCROLL
02.

About
Me

Available for work
Remote / On-site

DevOps Engineer specialising in AWS, Terraform, Kubernetes, and CI/CD automation across Hetzner and DigitalOcean. Certified in AWS, Terraform, and Kubernetes, with strong expertise in scalable cloud infrastructure and containerised deployments.

Focused on automation, reliability, and performance — using tools like Cloudflare to deliver secure, production-ready systems. I believe infrastructure should be reproducible, observable, and built to scale from day one.

"Focused on automation, reliability, and performance — delivering secure, production-ready systems."

DevOps & Automation

CI/CD: GitHub Actions, Jenkins
IaC: Terraform
Config Mgmt: Ansible
Version Control: Git, GitHub

Cloud & Platforms

AWS: EC2, S3, VPC, IAM, CloudWatch
DigitalOcean: Droplets, Networking
Hetzner: Cloud Servers, Load Balancers
Cloudflare: DNS, Security, Performance

Containers & Orchestration

Docker: Containerisation
Kubernetes: CKA Certified
Helm: Package Management
ArgoCD: GitOps Deployments

Monitoring & Observability

Prometheus: Metrics & Alerting
CloudWatch: AWS Monitoring
Elasticsearch: Log Management
03.

Key Focus
Areas

01
⚡

CI/CD Automation

Designing and implementing robust pipelines with GitHub Actions and Jenkins — enabling teams to ship reliably and fast with automated testing, builds, and deployments.

GitHub Actions Jenkins
02
🏗️

Infrastructure as Code

Provisioning and managing cloud infrastructure using Terraform across AWS, Hetzner, and DigitalOcean. Reproducible, version-controlled, and modular at scale.

Terraform Ansible
03
☸️

Kubernetes & Containers

Running production-grade Kubernetes clusters (EKS, DOKS, Hetzner K3s) with ArgoCD for GitOps, Helm for packaging, and Docker for containerisation.

Kubernetes Docker ArgoCD Helm
04
☁️

Cloud Platforms

Multi-cloud expertise across AWS (EC2, S3, VPC, IAM, CloudWatch), DigitalOcean, and Hetzner — with Cloudflare for DNS, security, and performance at the edge.

AWS Hetzner DigitalOcean Cloudflare
05
📊

Monitoring & Observability

Full-stack observability with Prometheus for metrics and alerting, Elasticsearch for log management, and AWS CloudWatch — keeping systems transparent and healthy.

Prometheus Elasticsearch CloudWatch
06
🔒

Security & Reliability

Embedding security and reliability throughout the stack — IAM policies, network segmentation, Cloudflare security rules, and automated backups for peace of mind.

IAM VPC Cloudflare Automation
04.

cations

05.

Featured
Projects

01

terraform-aws-infrastructure

Production-grade AWS infrastructure built with Terraform — VPC, subnets, security groups, EC2, S3, IAM roles, and CloudWatch monitoring. Modular architecture with remote state in S3 and DynamoDB locking.

Terraform AWS VPC EC2 S3 IAM
02

ecs-fargate-terraform

Fully serverless container platform on AWS ECS Fargate, provisioned with Terraform. Auto-scaling, ALB, ECR image registry, and IAM task roles — zero server management.

Terraform AWS ECS Fargate ECR ALB
03

k8s-hetzner-argocd

Kubernetes cluster on Hetzner Cloud using K3s with ArgoCD for GitOps-driven deployments. Automated provisioning with Terraform, Helm chart management, and Prometheus monitoring stack.

Kubernetes Hetzner ArgoCD K3s Terraform Helm
04

k8s-doks

Managed Kubernetes on DigitalOcean (DOKS) — cluster setup, networking, persistent volumes, and GitOps workflows. Load balancer integration and automated DNS via Cloudflare.

Kubernetes DigitalOcean DOKS Cloudflare Helm
05

k8s-eks-argocd

Production EKS cluster on AWS with ArgoCD for continuous delivery. Terraform-provisioned, with IRSA, Cluster Autoscaler, AWS Load Balancer Controller, and full observability via Prometheus.

AWS EKS ArgoCD Terraform Kubernetes Prometheus IRSA
06.

Let's build
something great

I'm always interested in discussing DevOps challenges, infrastructure automation, and how we can build more reliable systems together.
